calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of Two Minors.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Theo J. Emison III, Esq. appeared for petitioner Michelle Young, the Guardian ad Litem for the minors Hanna Young and Liam Young.
Order waiving Guardian ad Litem's appearance at today's hearing was filed on January 3, 2011.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $138,291.53.
Attorney Fees - $35,076.21.
Costs - $3,215.32.

The net balance of $100,000.00 shall be used for purchase of an Annuity for each of the minors from MetLife Tower Rosource Group, Inc. as described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise. Fifty thousand ($50,000.00) dollars for the purchase of an Annuity for Hanna Young, and fifty thousand ($50,000.00) dollars for the purchse of an Annuity for Liam Young.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
